v0.1.0.description:
# Prisma Road APWorld v0.1.0

Initial upload of the APWorld for Prisma Road

## To play it, first you must:

- Download Prisma Road from the itch.io page: [https://anriot.itch.io/prisma-road](https://anriot.itch.io/prisma-road)
- Make sure to download and uncompress the zip containing the version 1.0.6

## Setting Up

- In the main menu → Settings you will find **"AP MODE - Off"**, you can toggle it off and on. An indicator will appear in the top left corner with the connection status.
- To connect, you must have the AP mode on, and Start Game. This will show you a screen. Press Enter or Space to enter name and password if you have one. **Port is not necessary inside the game.**
- In the root of the zip, there is an `.exe` called `PrismaRoad_APBridge`. Execute it and it will ask for IP and port number. Enter the Archipelago room's IP and port and it will try to connect. This step can be done before or after entering the slot name inside the game.
- **To change slot name and password you must start the game while the bridge is not trying to connect or connected.**
- **TO START OR SWAP TO ANOTHER MULTIWORLD, YOU MUST DELETE THE AP DATA WHILE DISCONNECTED.** If you start the game after entering the port in the bridge `.exe`, it will connect automatically and mess with the checks.

## Known Issues

- Death link with Celeste works in one way (Celeste to Prisma Road)
- If not showing AP popups, it may be sending checks to another game. But if you think it's clogged, you can toggle the AP mode off and on again.
